error.entity_no_coordinates: The selected entity does not have location coordinates.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found in the entity registry.

data_description.location_entity: Select a person, device tracker, or zone to dynamically track weather for its location.

entity.description: Track weather for a person, device, or zone. The weather station will update automatically as the entity moves. For now, the API key can be anything. It is recommended to use a valid email address.
entity.title: Follow a person or device

location.description: If a METAR station code is not specified, the latitude and longitude will be used to find the closest station. For now, the API key can be anything. It is recommended to use a valid email address.
location.title: Set up a specific location

entity_not_found.message: The location entity was not found in the entity registry. Please reconfigure the integration.

entity_unavailable.message: The location entity {entity_id} is not available or does not have location coordinates. Setup will be retried.

get_forecasts_extra.description: Retrieves extra data for weather forecasts.

type.description: The scope of the weather forecast.
type.name: Forecast type

get_forecasts_extra.name: Get extra forecasts data
